scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend,web -c cyan,magenta,yellow "npm run dev --workspace=apps/backend" "npm run dev --workspace=apps/frontend" "npm run dev --workspace=apps/web"
scripts.dev:crm: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --workspace=apps/backend" "npm run dev --workspace=apps/frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=apps/backend && npm run build --workspace=apps/frontend
